title: List column for holding thousands of values
excerpt:
Hi! 
I’m trying to build a ticket system within Monday.com 
I need my employee to choose the customer (form now I have 2K customers) from a list 
What column type do you suggest? since the dropdown column is limited for …

posts.author: rula114 (rula )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I’m trying to build a ticket system within Monday.com
I need my employee to choose the customer (form now I have 2K customers) from a list
What column type do you suggest? since the dropdown column is limited for 500
Thanks,

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rula114

We would look to use something like Superforms (search this in the app marketplace) so we could use connected board column as a form question. Then, you can have your customers in a board as you would, and the form question would be to select the customer from that connected board as a list.

It’s not currently native to monday.com to use a connected board column in a form, so if you’re not up for a third party app, we would recommend waiting for monday.com to release their service based product - it’s on the near-future roadmap and solve all your ticketing system set-up woes.

Feel free to ping us an email if you want to talk more
teameasy@easy-mondays.com
